mapper.select: SELECT item_id AS "id", name, item_type AS "type", reason, source, enabled, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM blacklist_item ORDER BY source ASC, name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_setting(scope_id, setting_key, setting_json, updated_at) VALUES (#{scopeId}, #{settingKey}, CAST(#{settingJson} AS jsonb), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (scope_id, setting_key) DO UPDATE SET setting_json = EXCLUDED.setting_json, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
